description_long: This is a single gray athletic shoe designed for children, featuring a low-top silhouette and a rounded toe. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic materials, providing breathability and durability. Two wide Velcro straps cross the top for easy fastening and adjustment, replacing traditional laces. The shoe displays a prominent black Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, and the brand name 'NIKE' is printed in white on the heel tab. The midsole is white with a black outsole that has a rugged tread for traction. The interior appears padded for comfort, making it suitable for everyday urban activities.
description: A gray children's athletic shoe with Velcro straps, black Nike Swoosh logos, and a rugged black-and-white sole. The shoe is padded and designed for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded heel, white 'NIKE' branding, and the gray heel counter.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black Nike Swoosh, Velcro straps, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, dual Velcro straps, and the mesh texture of the upper.
description_view_3: Right side view with the black Nike Swoosh and visible stitching details along the upper.
attribute_logo: White 'NIKE' text on heel tab, black Swoosh logo on both sides
